text:
is the fifth collection of short stories for the Attack on Titan manga, written by Hajime Isayama. The booklet was bundled with the special edition of volume 31.

The English edition was exclusively released as two compilation volumes including stories from volume 3 and volume 4 in the final season part 1 manga box set released by Kodansha USA in December 2021 and final season part 2 manga box set released by Kodansha USA in November 2022.

The stories were originally published on the "au Smart Pass" and "Sugotoku" apps.
